question: How many orders has each gender of customers placed?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count, Customers.gender_code FROM Orders JOIN Customers ON Orders.customer_id = Customers.customer_id GROUP BY Customers.gender_code;

back_translation.intent: 统计每个性别的订单数量

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题询问每个性别的客户下单数量，SQL反向翻译描述正确地表达了统计每个性别订单数量的意图，并正确关联了Orders和Customers表，使用COUNT(*)进行聚合，按gender_code分组。
